steps.title: Identify the linear parts
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the lamb weighs $7$ pounds, so the initial value is $7$. The lamb gains $\frac{1}{3}$ pound per day, so the coefficient of $x$ is $\frac{1}{3}$.

steps.title: Write the weight function
steps.content: Weight after $x$ days equals initial weight plus daily gain times days. $$ g(x)=7+\frac{1}{3}x $$ $$ g(x)=\frac{1}{3}x+7 $$ The answer is B.
